meta-description: Learn about hardship exemptions by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Hardship exemption
excerpt: An exemption that’s needed when applying for Catastrophic coverage for people 30 and older who faced a "hardship" that prevented them from getting insurance. Hardship exemptions are one type of exemption that someone can claim to qualify for Catastrophic coverage, along with affordability exemptions.
content:
An exemption that’s needed when applying for Catastrophic coverage for people 30 and older who faced a "hardship" that prevented them from getting insurance. Hardship exemptions are one type of exemption that someone can claim to qualify for Catastrophic coverage, along with affordability exemptions.

  • Hardship exemptions for Catastrophic coverage & how to apply
